title: stelis lindenii
intro: Stelis lindenii, also known as Lipia or Lipia de Monte, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the orchid family. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Stelis lindenii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an expectorant, making it a popular remedy for colds and flu. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
